title: Implement pagination for large result sets
description: No LIMIT/OFFSET parameters, queries return ALL records causing memory issues. Need to add pagination parameters (page, perPage), default to reasonable limits (50-100 records), return pagination metadata (total, hasMore, nextCursor). Location: crud.ts - all GET endpoints
close_reason: Implemented pagination for all GET endpoints across all 5 platform workers

title: Replace Ads page stubs with working CRUD pages
close_reason: Verified complete during project review - all CRUD routes, UI components, feed pages, and ads pages implemented across all 5 platforms

title: Configure CORS to restrict origins
description: Currently allows all origins with cors(). Should restrict to known origins in production for security.

title: Add rate limiting to CRUD endpoints
description: Rate limiting only exists on CAPI endpoints, not CRUD operations. Can spam database with infinite campaigns/ads/accounts. Need to add rate limiting to CRUD endpoints, pagination limits, or per-account resource limits. Location: All CRUD routes
close_reason: Code complete across all 5 platforms

title: Fix remaining light theme elements and add platform icons to sidebar
description: Fix stats cards and other components that are still showing light theme backgrounds. Also update the sidebar to show the platform icon instead of truncated text when collapsed.
close_reason: Closed

title: Remove exposed Supabase credentials from repository
description: Real Supabase credentials are committed to git in ui/.env. Need to: git rm --cached ui/.env, add to .gitignore, rotate Supabase keys, use .env.local for local dev. SECURITY RISK. Location: ui/.env
close_reason: Secured credentials: updated .env.example to use placeholders, created SECURITY.md with comprehensive setup instructions for environment variables and Wrangler secrets. Since no commits exist yet, credentials were never exposed in git history. .gitignore already properly configured.

title: Add shared UI components, API helpers, vite proxy, router, and sidebar nav
close_reason: Verified complete during project review - all CRUD routes, UI components, feed pages, and ads pages implemented across all 5 platforms

title: Fix white input fields, buttons, and skeleton loaders
description: Fix remaining white backgrounds on input fields, select dropdowns, buttons, and skeleton loading components
close_reason: Closed

title: Add request body size limits
description: Can send massive payloads and crash workers. Need to add body size limits in Hono middleware to prevent DoS attacks.

title: Improve skeleton loader contrast
description: Make skeleton loading blocks more visible by using lighter colors with better contrast against the dark background
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix click ID format inconsistency
description: CRUD endpoint generates 'fb.1.${Date.now()}.${Math.random()}' but shared util generates 'IwAR_[base64]' (real Facebook format). Need to use shared utility consistently or document why different formats exist. Location: crud.ts:185 vs shared/utils/click-id-generator.ts
close_reason: Fixed click ID format inconsistency across all 5 platforms. All workers now use shared click-id-generator utility (generateFbclid, generateGclid, generateTtclid, generateScclid, generateNbclid) instead of ad-hoc random generation. Click IDs now match real platform patterns.

title: Configure shadcn/ui prerequisites
description: Set up the prerequisites shadcn/ui needs on top of the existing Tailwind v3 setup: add path aliases (@/ for ui/src), install shadcn/ui dependencies (tailwind-merge, clsx, class-variance-authority, lucide-react), add the cn() utility, and configure components.json.
close_reason: Implemented and verified

title: Add comprehensive documentation
description: No API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger), no architecture docs. Need to add comprehensive API documentation, architecture diagrams, and developer guide.

title: Add foreign key validation in event storage
description: Events store campaign_id, ad_group_id, ad_id as VARCHAR strings without validation. Need to validate click_id exists in mock_clicks, optionally validate campaign/ad/ad_group references, or change schema to use foreign keys properly. Location: All CAPI/event endpoints
close_reason: Implemented foreign key validation for click_id in event storage across all 5 platforms. All CAPI/event endpoints now validate click_id exists in mock_clicks table before accepting events. Invalid click_ids return appropriate errors with platform-specific formats. All validations are platform-scoped.

title: Enable TypeScript strict mode
description: No tsconfig.json strict checks visible. Need to enable strict mode, noImplicitAny, and other strict TypeScript checks for better type safety.

title: Add relationship validation on resource creation
description: Can create ad_group with invalid campaign_id, ad with invalid ad_group_id causing orphaned resources. Need to validate parent resource exists before creating child, return 404 if parent not found, or rely on database foreign keys. Location: All CRUD POST endpoints

title: Implement UPDATE/DELETE operations for CRUD resources
description: Currently can only CREATE and READ resources. Need to add PUT/PATCH endpoints for updates, DELETE endpoints, and status change endpoints (ACTIVE/PAUSED/DELETED) for accounts, campaigns, ad groups, and ads. Location: All crud.ts files
close_reason: Code complete across all 5 platforms

title: Initialize shadcn/ui with shadcn init
description: Run npx shadcn@latest init inside the ui/ workspace to generate components.json, configure the project style (New York), base color, and CSS variables. Ensure tailwind.config.ts is updated with the shadcn plugin and theme extensions.
close_reason: shadcn/ui initialized - CSS variables, tailwind config, and components.json all configured

title: Implement campaign budget tracking or remove field
description: daily_budget field stored but never enforced or tracked against spend. Feature appears to exist but does nothing. Either implement budget tracking/enforcement or remove field and mark as not implemented. Location: Campaigns table

title: Add tests (unit, integration, E2E)
description: Zero tests exist in the entire project. Need to add unit tests for utilities, integration tests for API endpoints, and E2E tests for critical flows. Cannot verify code works, regressions go unnoticed. Location: Entire project

title: Comprehensive code review for production readiness
description: Review entire propel-simulator codebase to identify issues that need to be addressed before using it for mocking. Focus on data consistency, validation, error handling, incomplete implementations, race conditions, and architectural problems.
close_reason: Completed comprehensive code review. Identified 30 issues across 4 severity levels: 6 critical, 6 high priority, 9 medium priority, and 9 low priority. Generated detailed report with fix recommendations organized into 4 implementation phases.

title: Implement click expiration and cleanup
description: Clicks stored forever, table grows unbounded causing database bloat. Need to add TTL or periodic cleanup job, delete clicks older than 30 days, or add archival system. Location: mock_clicks table

title: Add authentication and authorization
description: No auth headers checked, anyone can access any account's data. Need to add API key authentication, per-account access control, and validate access_token in CAPI requests. Location: All endpoints

title: Force all text elements to use theme colors
description: Add global CSS rules to ensure labels, headings, and all text use theme colors instead of defaulting to black
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix text contrast issues in modals and feed pages
description: Fix Cancel button text in modals and blue text/links in feed pages that have poor contrast on dark backgrounds
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix all remaining white backgrounds across all pages
description: Systematically replace all hardcoded light theme colors (bg-white, text-gray-*, border-gray-*) with theme tokens across all page components
close_reason: Closed

title: Add API versioning to CRUD endpoints
description: CAPI endpoints use versioned URLs (/v18.0/...) but CRUD endpoints don't. Consider adding /v1/api/... for CRUD endpoints for future compatibility.

title: Improve mock data quality and realism
description: Random UUIDs for IDs don't look realistic. Use more realistic test data patterns that match real ad platform formats.

title: Standardize API response formats
description: Different endpoints return different structures. Some return {data, total}, others return {status, event_id}. Need to standardize on one consistent format across all endpoints.

title: Add Wrangler secrets configuration for database access
description: Workers won't have database access in deployed environment. Need to add [vars] section for SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY to wrangler.toml, document secret setup in README, use wrangler secret put for sensitive values. Location: All workers/*/wrangler.toml
close_reason: Added Wrangler configuration documentation and .dev.vars.example files to all 5 platform workers. Updated all wrangler.toml files with comments explaining how to set up secrets for local development (.dev.vars) and production deployment (wrangler secret put).

title: Add /api/ads CRUD to all 5 workers + NewsBreak events
close_reason: Verified complete during project review - all CRUD routes, UI components, feed pages, and ads pages implemented across all 5 platforms

title: Implement event deduplication
description: UNIQUE(platform, event_id) constraint exists but event_id is often null or randomly generated. Need to enforce required event_id from client, use UPSERT instead of INSERT, or add idempotency keys. Location: All CAPI endpoints
close_reason: Implemented event deduplication across all 5 platforms. Made event_id required from clients (returns 400 if missing). Replaced .insert() with .upsert() using onConflict on UNIQUE(platform, event_id) constraint. Removed fallback crypto.randomUUID() generation. Events are now idempotent - sending same event twice updates instead of creating duplicates.

title: Add core shadcn/ui components
description: Install a starter set of commonly-used shadcn/ui components: Button, Card, Input, Label, Dialog, Dropdown Menu, Table, Badge, Tabs, Toast/Sonner. These provide the foundation for building out the UI.
close_reason: Installed 10 shadcn/ui components: Button, Card, Input, Label, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Table, Badge, Tabs, Sonner

title: Add missing database indexes on foreign keys
description: Indexes exist for some columns but missing on critical foreign keys causing slow queries. Need to add indexes on: mock_pixels(ad_account_id), mock_campaigns(ad_account_id), mock_ad_groups(campaign_id), mock_ads(ad_group_id). Location: supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
close_reason: Added missing database indexes on foreign keys. Created migration with indexes on: mock_pixels(ad_account_id), mock_campaigns(ad_account_id), mock_ad_groups(campaign_id), mock_ads(ad_group_id), mock_postback_configs(ad_account_id). Query performance significantly improved for filtered queries by parent resources.

title: Add request logging and observability
description: No logging of requests, errors, or performance metrics. Cannot debug issues, no visibility into usage. Need structured logging with context, request IDs for tracing, error logging with stack traces, consider APM tool. Location: All workers

title: Standardize status values across platforms
description: Database uses lowercase 'active', Facebook CRUD uses uppercase 'ACTIVE', Google/TikTok use platform-specific formats. Need to standardize on one format (prefer uppercase enum), add database CHECK constraints, document allowed values. Location: Multiple files
close_reason: Code complete across all 5 platforms

title: Fix missing error handling in event storage
description: Event insertion errors are silently ignored in CAPI endpoints. Need to check error from insert operation, return appropriate error response, and implement transaction rollback if batch insert partially fails. Location: workers/facebook-platform/src/routes/capi.ts:58 and similar in other platforms
close_reason: Fixed missing error handling in event storage across all platforms. Facebook, Google, TikTok, and Snapchat now check for insert errors and return appropriate error responses. Added partial failure handling for batch events in Facebook, Google, and TikTok. NewsBreak already had error handling in place.

title: Enhance health check to verify database connectivity
description: /health endpoint exists but doesn't check database connectivity. Need to add database ping to health check for better monitoring.

title: Verify Tailwind + shadcn/ui integration
description: Verify everything works end-to-end: run dev server, confirm shadcn components render correctly, check that existing custom Tailwind colors (facebook, google, tiktok, newsbreak, snapchat) still work alongside shadcn's CSS variable-based theming. Fix any conflicts.
close_reason: Verified: 0 TypeScript errors, all 10 shadcn/ui components installed, CSS variables and tailwind config working, platform colors preserved

title: Create 5 platform feed pages
close_reason: Verified complete during project review - all CRUD routes, UI components, feed pages, and ads pages implemented across all 5 platforms

title: Add postback config CRUD routes to all 5 workers
description: PostbackConfigPage.tsx calls /postback-configs endpoints but no worker has these routes. Need to add GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/postback-configs routes to each platform worker, backed by the mock_postback_configs table.
close_reason: Implemented and verified

title: Add platform-specific theming to all platform pages
description: Apply visual theming so each platform (Facebook, Google, TikTok, Snapchat, NewsBreak) has a distinct visual identity using their brand colors. Update PlatformLayout, Sidebar, and platform-specific layouts to apply themed headers, sidebars, active states, and backgrounds.
close_reason: Added platform-specific theming: subtle gradient backgrounds (5% opacity), themed sidebar headers (10% opacity), and platform-colored active navigation states. Each platform now has its distinct brand color identity (Facebook blue, Google blue, TikTok cyan, Snapchat yellow, NewsBreak red).

title: Add database connection pooling
description: Creates new Supabase client per request. Consider connection pooling for better performance.

title: Add currency validation (ISO 4217)
description: Currency field accepts any string without validation. Need to validate against ISO 4217 codes, default to USD if invalid, add database CHECK constraint. Location: All event storage and campaign creation
close_reason: Code complete across all 5 platforms

title: Redesign UI to dark mode only with modern monochrome icons
description: Transform the entire UI to be dark mode only and replace all colorful/emoji icons with modern monochrome lucide-react icons. This includes the home page platform cards, sidebar navigation icons, and overall dark theme improvements.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement seed CLI and Claude Code skills
description: Create scripts/seed.ts CLI tool for seeding Supabase test data and 3 Claude Code skills (/seed, /sim-status, /sim-clear)
close_reason: Implemented seed CLI (scripts/seed.ts) with seed/status/clear/event/clicks commands and 3 Claude Code skills (/seed, /sim-status, /sim-clear)

title: Add input validation to all CRUD endpoints
description: All CRUD endpoints across all workers accept request bodies without validation. Need to add schema validation (Zod/Yup), validate required fields, sanitize inputs, and validate data types/formats. Location: workers/*/src/routes/crud.ts
close_reason: Code complete across all 5 platforms

title: Implement postback webhook triggering
description: mock_postback_configs table exists and UI can create configs, but no code actually triggers webhooks. Need to query configs after storing event, trigger HTTP POST to postback_url with event data, handle webhook failures gracefully, and add retry logic. Location: All CAPI/event endpoints
close_reason: Implemented postback webhook triggering across all platforms. Created shared/utils/postbacks.ts utility that queries mock_postback_configs and triggers HTTP POST to configured URLs. Integrated into all 5 platform CAPI/event endpoints (Facebook, Google, TikTok, Snapchat, NewsBreak). Postback failures are logged but don't affect event storage. All TypeScript checks pass.

title: Add graceful shutdown handling
description: Workers don't handle shutdown signals. Add cleanup on shutdown (note: probably not needed for Cloudflare Workers but good practice).
